logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.

WARNING: [HLS 200-885] The II Violation in module 'matrix_mult' (loop 'Row_Col'): Unable to schedule 'load' operation ('A_load', src/matrix_mult.cpp:14) on array 'A' due to limited memory ports (II = 3). Please consider using a memory core with more ports or partitioning the array 'A'. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-885 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-885.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-885] The II Violation in module 'matrix_mult' (loop 'Row_Col'): Unable to schedule 'load' operation ('A_load_3', src/matrix_mult.cpp:14) on array 'A' due to limited memory ports (II = 2). Please consider using a memory core with more ports or partitioning the array 'A'. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-885 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-885.html

WARNING: [HLS 200-885] The II Violation in module 'matrix_mult' (loop 'Row_Col'): Unable to schedule 'load' operation ('A_load_2', src/matrix_mult.cpp:14) on array 'A' due to limited memory ports (II = 1). Please consider using a memory core with more ports or partitioning the array 'A'. Resolution: For help on HLS 200-885 see www.xilinx.com/cgi-bin/docs/rdoc?v=2022.2;t=hls+guidance;d=200-885.html

WARNING: [XSIM 43-3373] "D:/.YOLO_FPN_FPGA_Accelerator_Paper/07_experiments/stage0_environment_validation/exp03_day5_hls_matmul/day5_hls_matmul/solution1/sim/verilog/AESL_axi_slave_control.v" Line 784. System function $fread is used as system task. This system function should have a LHS e.g. x=$fread().

System function $fread is used as system task. This system function should have a LHS e.g. x=$fread().

System function $fread is used as system task. This system function should have a LHS e.g. x=$fread().

WARNING: [XSIM 43-3373] "D:/.YOLO_FPN_FPGA_Accelerator_Paper/07_experiments/stage0_environment_validation/exp03_day5_hls_matmul/day5_hls_matmul/solution1/sim/verilog/AESL_axi_slave_control.v" Line 658. System function $fread is used as system task. This system function should have a LHS e.g. x=$fread().
WARNING: [HLS 200-626] This design is unable to schedule all read ports in the first II cycle. The RTL testbench may treat the design as non-pipelined
